summary: A Russian FPV drone entered a Ukrainian pickup truck through an open window but failed to detonate, while Ukrainian forces struck Russian air defense and engineering assets in Sumy Oblast using LMUR missiles and FPV/bomber drones. The Kalashnikov Concern began testing the Krona air defense system for UAVs, and Ukraine’s 429th Achilles Brigade destroyed a rare Russian IMR-3 vehicle near Vovchansk. Russian Rubicon Center operators reported 193 enemy targets destroyed on April 14, including fixed-wing UAVs and personnel, while the 238th Guards Artillery Brigade intercepted a Ukrainian Hornet UAV with the Elka drone, triggering its warhead. Ukrainian forces also captured a Shark-M UAV after an Elka intercept caused its parachute to deploy.
